name: Turquoise Hill Resources Ltd.
description: Turquoise Hill Resources Ltd. was an international mining company primarily focused on the operation and development of the Oyu Tolgoi copper-gold mine in Southern Mongolia. Headquartered in Montreal, Quebec, the company served as a key vehicle for mineral exploration and development. Following its acquisition by Rio Tinto Group in December 2022, Turquoise Hill became a wholly-owned subsidiary, consolidating its interests in the Oyu Tolgoi project, which remains one of the world's largest known copper and gold deposits. The company's operations were central to large-scale mining activities in the region.
